notes:
- Added chunked replay writing to reduce end-of-match save hangs on larger recordings.
- Added 30-second keyframes and faster seek paths for large timeline jumps.
- Added lazy chunk loading so long replays can start playback and continue loading ranges as needed.
- Added best-effort recovery tools for unfinished temp recordings after crashes or force closes.
- Added an Advanced tester option to compare fast keyframe seeking against the fallback seek path.
- Improved replay storage, loading, and seeking internals while preserving exact recorded replay data.

releases.notes:
- Added chunked replay writing to reduce end-of-match save hangs on larger recordings.
- Added 30-second keyframes and faster seek paths for large timeline jumps.
- Added lazy chunk loading so long replays can start playback and continue loading ranges as needed.
- Added best-effort recovery tools for unfinished temp recordings after crashes or force closes.
- Added an Advanced tester option to compare fast keyframe seeking against the fallback seek path.
- Improved replay storage, loading, and seeking internals while preserving exact recorded replay data.

- Updated Replay Mod for Puck 897.
- Added replay import/export polish, imported replay metadata, and imported badges.
- Added library search, filtering, and category-based sorting with ascending/descending order.
- Refined recording settings with Save on Disconnect and clearer Recording/Playback/Display section organization.
- Improved update visibility with main-menu/pause-menu update badges and cleaner About / Updates release notes.
- Polished Replay Manager layout, dropdown alignment, sliders, window sizing, and tooltips.

- Added minimum-player automatic recording and optional split-by-game-end recording.
- Improved Replay Manager sizing, scaling, slider alignment, and About / Updates discovery.
- Improved playback end behavior so seeking near the end pauses on the final tick instead of closing the viewer.
- Improved compatibility with Toaster's Reskin Loader cosmetics in online replay recordings.
- Fixed stick tilt handling so normal Puck goal replays and saved Replay Mod playback behave correctly.
